headline: Nike (NKE) Valuation Check After A Tough Year Of Share Price Declines
summary: Event overview and why NIKE (NKE) is on investor radars NIKE (NKE) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the stock with a year-to-date total return of about a 19% decline, alongside a roughly 17% decline over the past year. Those moves come as the company reports annual revenue of US$46.5b and net income of US$2.5b, prompting investors to reassess how current pricing lines up with NIKE’s global footwear and apparel footprint.
